name: UPPERCUT
description: [UPPERCUT](https://attack.mitre.org/software/S0275) is a 32-bit HTTP-based backdoor that has been used by [menuPass](https://attack.mitre.org/groups/G0045) since at least 2017.(Citation: FireEye APT10 Sept 2018) Once thought to be exclusive to [menuPass](https://attack.mitre.org/groups/G0045), [UPPE
